Join

About Caerus

Students helping future students

Our Mission

Reduce stress and improve preparation for new EPFL students. We believe that good preparation changes everything.

Why Caerus?

We've lived the EPFL experience. We know how difficult the first weeks can be when you're not prepared. Caerus was born from this experience: offering what we wish we had.

Our Values

Clarity

Direct explanations, without unnecessary jargon.

Rigor

Serious content, meeting EPFL expectations.

Empathy

We understand your doubts because we've experienced them.

Realism

No impossible promises. Just honest preparation.

The Team

A small team of EPFL students passionate about teaching.
